label: Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy

node.label: Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy
node.definition: Parameters are chosen to assign high probability to observed targets or data.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy is to connect Probability theory, Information theory to downstream capabilities including Linear models & generalized linear models, Hidden Markov models & CRFs, Matrix factorization & topic models.
examples: substrate for Linear models & generalized linear models
substrate for Hidden Markov models & CRFs
substrate for Matrix factorization & topic models
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Information theory.

dependencies.rationale: Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy uses Information theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy uses Supervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Parameters are chosen to assign high probability to observed targets or data.

The role of Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy is to connect Probability theory, Information theory to downstream capabilities including Linear models & generalized linear models, Hidden Markov models & CRFs, Matrix factorization & topic models.
substrate for Linear models & generalized linear models
substrate for Hidden Markov models & CRFs
substrate for Matrix factorization & topic models

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Probability theory, Information theory.
Maximum likelihood & cross-entropy uses Probability theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
